title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Grylls provides a glimpse into his crew that follows his adventurous antics.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In Mexico's Copper Canyon, Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive by using traditional cave shelters, fishing without lines or nets and even eating mud.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls demonstrates how to find food, battle the elements and deal with deadly animals in some of the most dangerous locations in the world.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sun stroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly salt water crocodiles.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear provides a guide on how to find water in the baking salt flats of Mexico, skin snakes in Panama and battle Indonesian sharks.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
subTitle: The big top gets a makeover as Oliviana, Alivi and Katlyn compete for the circus crown at the IFF Pageant in Macon, Georgia, USA.

title: The Perfect Murder
subTitle: When Jeffery Locker is found stabbed to death, detectives suspect he might have been in the wrong place at the wrong time. But the truth, they learn, is far more shocking.

title: Inside the Heist
subTitle: Veteran thieves walk away with millions after drilling into a London vault.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
subTitle: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. When their secret is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
subTitle: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

title: Resident Evil: Extinction
subTitle: During a zombie apocalypse engineered by the Umbrella Corporation, Alice and a group of survivors journey across the country in search of supplies and a safe place.

title: Drunken Master II
subTitle: Wong Fei-hung finds himself in the middle of a suggling conspiracy, using his mastery of Drunken Boxing to take on dangerous foes and protect his homeland.

title: Rumble in the Bronx
subTitle: A man goes to New York to visit his uncle, however, he encounters a street gang and fights them with his martial arts skills.

title: The Equalizer 2
subTitle: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

title: Men in Black: International
subTitle: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls explores Arizona's wilderness, home to Apache heritage, while demonstrating survival techniques across the region's diverse terrain, from desert landscapes to frigid mountain peaks.

subTitle: Bear Grylls shows how to make a snow cave, find water in deep tunnels and avoid frostbite in order to survive Iceland's extreme conditions.

subTitle: Bear is locked in the backwoods of Alabama where he navigates freezing white water rapids and braves a raging forest fire. But can he escape a deep limestone cave?
